extraSources.name: Irish Immigration Service — Coming to study in Ireland

requirements.label: Letter of acceptance
requirements.detail: An acceptance letter from a recognised Irish institution on the Interim List of Eligible Programmes (ILEP).

requirements.label: Evidence of finances (€10,000)
requirements.detail: Show immediate access to at least €10,000 for living expenses for a course of one year (and the same for each subsequent year), excluding tuition.

requirements.label: Tuition fees paid
requirements.detail: Evidence that course fees have been paid (often required before the visa decision).

requirements.label: Private medical insurance
requirements.detail: Private medical insurance covering your stay in Ireland.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for at least 12 months after arrival.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer tuition or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you an Irish number and data on landing.

requirements.label: Accommodation
requirements.detail: Dublin housing is scarce — arrange early.
